title: Bloom-Entity
description: This resource pack adds bloom highlighting to some entities.
body:
This resource pack enhances selected hostile entities with a bloom glow effect using vanilla shaders only. Glowing eyes and subtle light effects make mobs feel more atmospheric and cinematic — without external shaders or mods. ✨

## Affected entities include:
Zombie, Drowned, Skeleton, Spider, Creeper, Ghast, Witch, Endermite.

### To enable the bloom effect, go to Settings → Video Settings → Graphics = Fabulous!

![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/09b0982628be9dd0aa049f52684c48349526505c.png)
